ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., Bug, Improvement) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the recommendation (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "likelihood" TEXT /* Likelihood of occurrence */,
  "accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recommendation has been accepted */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Reference to the commit where the recommendation was addressed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the recommendation */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* Address of the smart contract related to the recommendation */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the potential impact of the recommendation */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected date by which the recommendation should be resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, auditor, product manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., accepted, in progress, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_status" (
  "rec_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation status update */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation that is being tracked */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the recommendation */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status update was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_status_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_status_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_tags" (
  "rec_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was associated with the recommendation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_tags_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_department" (
  "rec_dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was assigned to the recommendation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_department_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_department_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation the alert is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)
